title: bulbophyllum canlaonense
intro: Bulbophyllum canlaonense, also known as Canlaon Bulbophyllum, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the Philippines. This epiphytic orchid has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum canlaonense include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in relieving respiratory problems and skin infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the roots of this orchid are typically dried and processed into teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
